description_long: This chaise is constructed from thick, roughly hewn wooden logs, giving it a rustic and robust appearance. The frame is rectangular, with two long horizontal logs forming the seat and backrest, and shorter logs at the ends providing structural support. The legs are made from solid wood, positioned at each corner, and are slightly angled outward for stability. The wood surface is visibly textured, with natural grain and irregularities, suggesting it is unfinished or minimally treated. There are no visible cushions or upholstery, and the seat area is a simple wooden platform. The overall design is utilitarian, evoking a handcrafted or outdoor park bench style suitable for urban parks or rustic public spaces.
description: A rustic wooden chaise made from thick, rough-hewn logs with a simple, sturdy frame and no visible upholstery or cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad wooden backrest and the rectangular seat framed by thick logs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the thickness of the wooden logs, with angled legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the backrest and seat structure clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and log construction, with the angled legs prominent.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a thick, horizontal wooden log spanning the width of the chaise, with a straight, uncurved profile and no decorative elements or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: There are no armrests present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, solid wooden posts, slightly angled outward for stability, with a rough, unfinished texture and no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery; the surface is bare wood with a natural, rough grain pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the seating area consists solely of the wooden platform formed by the logs.
